# services.jboss

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.jboss`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.jboss.deployDir` | `string` | Location of the deployment files |
| `services.jboss.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable JBoss. WARNING : this package is outdated and is known to have vulnerabilities. |
| `services.jboss.libUrl` | `string` | Location where the shared library JARs are stored |
| `services.jboss.logDir` | `string` | Location of the logfile directory of JBoss |
| `services.jboss.serverDir` | `string` | Location of the server instance files |
| `services.jboss.tempDir` | `string` | Location where JBoss stores its temp files |
| `services.jboss.useJK` | `boolean` | Whether to use to connector to the Apache HTTP server |
| `services.jboss.user` | `string` | User account under which jboss runs. |
